data.title: Hims, The Surprise Winner Of The FDA Showdown With Peptides, Bounds Higher
data.description: The stock of Hims surged on Thursday following an FDA panel's suggestion to compound a well-liked peptide for injury recovery. This recommendation led to a significant increase in Hims' stock price. This development made Hims a surprise winner in the FDA showdown regarding peptides.

data.title: Alps Dx to Launch Xpressor™ by Alps Dx at ADLM 2026, a Fit-for-Purpose Filtration with Capping Solution Designed to Improve Oral Fluid Sample Quality and Preanalytical Efficiency
data.description: Alps Dx is set to enhance its oral fluid testing portfolio by introducing the Atelier™ automated preanalytical processing platform in addition to launching Xpressor™, a filtration with capping innovation. The company, based in RICHMOND, Va., revealed this news on July 23, 2026, via a press release. This move is part of their efforts to expand their offerings in the oral fluid testing sector.
Judge Pauses Paramount's Acquisition Of Warner Bros For Additional 14 Days Through August 17 - Court Ruling - reports

data.title: MAIA MANAGEMENT GROUP ANNOUNCES SUMMER SHOWCASE AND RELAUNCH
data.description: On August 7, 2026, MAIA Management Group, LLC (MMG) is organizing a free event to mark over 30 years of influence and debut its extended regional strategy in Frederick, Maryland. The Summer Showcase & Relaunch will take place from 3 to 6 p.m. at FITCI, located at 321. Join in to celebrate the accomplishments and future plans of MMG.

data.title: Achieve named to Az Business Magazine's '10 Best Places for Women to Work in Arizona' for 2026
data.description: Achieve, a leading digital personal finance company based in San Mateo, California, was recently recognized for its dedication to providing women with opportunities for advancement and leadership. On July 23, 2026, Achieve was listed as one of the top 10 Best Places for Women to Work in Arizona by Az Business. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to fostering a supportive and inclusive work environment, further solidifying its reputation as a favorable workplace for women.

data.title: Coinbase now allows businesses to accept USDC payments from AI agents. They introduce AI trading tools and developer kit. Expanding financial support for AI.
data.description: In addition to implementing AI trading tools and a developer kit, the exchange has launched initiatives to create financial infrastructure for independent AI agents.

data.title: Rithm Property Trust Inc. Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: In New York, Rithm Property Trust Inc. (NYSE: RPT) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the second quarter of 2026, covering the period up to June 30, 2026, on July 28, 2026. These results will be shared post-market close on the New York Stock Exchange. Further, a conference hosted by the management is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 P.M. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access a copy of the earnings release on the Events & Presentations section of the Company’s website.

data.title: Seven & i Holdings Appoints Mauricio Leyva as CEO of 7-Eleven, Inc.
data.description: Mauricio Leyva has been appointed as the new Chief Executive Officer of 7-Eleven, Inc. The appointment comes as part of the company's efforts to enhance the customer experience and promote sustainable growth. Seven & i Holdings Co., Ltd. made the announcement on July 23, 2026, in Irving, Texas. Leyva will be leading the transformation of the company, with a focus on driving positive change and achieving long-term success.

data.title: Perimeter Announces Date for Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in Clayton, Missouri, Perimeter Solutions (NYSE: PRM), a prominent supplier of industrial products and services for vital customer missions, revealed plans to disclose its financial data for the second quarter of 2026 on July 31, 2026, before the market opens.

data.title: Heart-Valve Maker Edwards Lifesciences Launches On Beat-And-Raise Second Quarter
data.description: Edwards Lifesciences saw a significant increase in stock value on Thursday following a successful second quarter where the company exceeded Wall Street's expectations for both revenue and profits. The heart-valve maker's stock surged as a result of this positive performance.

data.title: Chipmaker MaxLinear Tops Wall Street's Targets But Stock Slides
data.description: MaxLinear, a leading chipmaker, exceeded expectations for the second quarter and provided a positive sales outlook for Q3. Despite this, the company's stock experienced a decline. MaxLinear's strong performance included surpassing Wall Street's targets, yet its stock price fell following the report.

data.title: These Industrial Stock Moves Send A Bullish Signal About The Economy
data.description: An impressive earnings beat-and-raise trend has emerged among leading holdings of the XLI ETF, indicating a potential industrial upturn. This development is seen as a positive indicator for the economy as these industrial stocks show strong performance.

data.title: Amazon Stock Slips Below Key Level As Google Sets Tone For Hefty AI Spending
data.description: Amazon's stock dropped below the 200-day moving average following Google's Q2 report, which raised concerns about increased costs in artificial intelligence (AI). This news has caused Amazon's stock to slip below a crucial level, reflecting the impact of Google's hefty spending on AI.

data.title: SpaceX Leads Race To Dodge Orbital Debris As Risk Outpaces Regulation
data.description: In the next five decades, the multitrillion-dollar space industry, spearheaded by SpaceX and its interplanetary goals, faces a significant threat from orbital debris. The risk of colliding with space junk is increasing faster than regulations can keep up, jeopardizing the future of space exploration and commercial activities.

data.title: Tesla Reports $1 Billion Gain On Its SpaceX Equity Stake
data.description: Since June 30, the value of SpaceX stock has decreased by approximately 33%. Additionally, Tesla has reported a gain of $1 billion from its equity stake in SpaceX. This information was recently shared on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Cadre Holdings Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings and Conference Call Information
data.description: Headquartered in Jacksonville, Florida, Cadre Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CDRE), a prominent figure in safety equipment manufacturing and distribution for law enforcement, first responders, military, and nuclear sectors, shared its intention to unveil its financial performance for the second quarter ended June 30, 2026, on August 5, 2026. The announcement will be made after market closing. A conference call is set to take place to discuss the details.

data.title: Rexford Industrial Announces Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. (NYSE: REXR) has revised its 2026 Core FFO per share guidance upwards. The company also disclosed its plan to realign its portfolio by aiming to dispose of assets totaling between $1.5 billion and $2.0 billion by 2026. This announcement was made in Los Angeles on July 23, 2026.

data.title: Delek US Holdings, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Delek US Holdings, Inc. revealed a new update today, stating that its Board of Directors has given the green light for a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share, scheduled to be distributed on August 10, 2026, to shareholders on record as of August 3, 2026. Delek US Holdings, Inc. is recognized as a diversified downstream energy entity, with interests in petroleum refining, logistics, and pipelines. The company's refining portfolio is chiefly made up of refineries based in Tyler and Big Spring, Texas.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Netflix Dives, SpaceX Scrubs Launch; AI Stocks Try To Halt Sell-Off
data.description: The stock market saw a decline in futures due to Netflix plummeting and SpaceX cancelling a Starship launch. AI-related stocks, including Sandisk, attempted to resist the downward trend before the market opening. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
Goldman Sachs offers way to trade AI junk debt $250 million at a time. $GS
